parts.text:
Your task is to execute the scheduled task below as specified in that task's description. You are the scheduled worker, not the main agent: you cannot reach the user.

If the scheduled work is complete and nothing needs reporting, stop taking actions. Do not use cron to mark the run complete, re-run it, or modify schedules. A later terminal phase will handle completion for you.

[WORKER TASK]
job_id: iwsdk-daily-build-summary
mode: task

[BODY]
## IWSDK Daily Build — Morning Summary & Validation

This is the final wrap-up job. Three responsibilities:

### 1. Deliver morning briefing

Read `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/latest-build-summary.md` and `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/current-build-status.json`.

Deliver a concise summary including:
- Game name and one-line concept
- Live URL (GitHub Pages) and repo URL
- Key features (5-8 bullets)
- Scale: file count and line count
- Total build time (accumulated across all rounds)
- Number of rounds it took

### 2. Validate `.agent/journal/` in GitHub

Check that the build journal exists in the repo:
```
gh api repos/ellyz2426/<game-name>/contents/.agent/journal --jq '.[].name' 2>&1
```

If missing or incomplete:
- Find session JSONL files from `~/agents/` that correspond to today's build
- Copy them into the game's `.agent/journal/` directory
- Create `.agent/journal/state/` if it doesn't exist
- Commit and push

### 3. Validate GitHub Pages deployment

```
curl -sI https://ellyz2426.github.io/<game-name>/ | head -3
```

If not returning HTTP 200:
- Rebuild: `cd ~/workspace/<game-name> && npm run build`
- Redeploy to gh-pages branch
- Trigger pages build: `gh api repos/ellyz2426/<game-name>/pages/builds -X POST`
- Verify it comes up

### 4. Mark build complete

Update `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/current-build-status.json`:
- Set `status` to `"complete"` regardless (the build window is over)
- This prevents any straggler check-in jobs from starting new rounds

Deliver to main chat and Telegram.

[RUN CONTEXT]
scheduled_for_local: Fri 2026-07-03 08:30:00 PDT (America/Los_Angeles)
trigger_reason: scheduled
attempt: 1

# Latest Build Summary — Neon Trivia VR (#86)

## Status: COMPLETE (360 / 360 min)

**Game:** Neon Trivia VR
**Date:** 2026-07-03
**Repo:** https://github.com/ellyz2426/neon-trivia
**Live:** https://ellyz2426.github.io/neon-trivia/
**Source:** 3,242 lines TypeScript + 18 UIKitML panels

## Build Rounds

| Round | Key Additions |
|-------|--------------|
| 1 | Full game: 1,656 LoC, 16 panels, 210 questions, 8 modes, 40 achievements, 6 themes, XP/leveling, leaderboard, 3D holodeck |
| 2 | +90 questions (300), typed input, difficulty filtering, visual answer feedback, HUD effects |
| 3 | Post-game review, enhanced 3D scene (torus ring, orbiting lights, 250 particles), power-ups, per-category stats, streaks |
| 4 | +100 questions (400), Challenge vs AI mode, trail particles, title/difficulty/help UI, XR haptics |
| 5 | +100 questions (500), Endless mode (3 lives, dynamic difficulty), achievement notifications, leaderboard expansion, holographic float, performance optimizations |
| 6 | Procedural audio (9 SFX), 50 achievements, timer urgency, 5 leaderboard filters, gameover/title enhancements |
| 7 | +100 questions (600), Survival mode (clock mechanic), 60 achievements, timer urgency visuals, difficulty breakdown in gameover, category mastery indicators, dual decorative rings, XR glyph fixes |

## Final Tallies
- 600 trivia questions (60/category x 10 categories)
- 11 game modes (classic, speed, streak, category, daily, blitz, marathon, practice, challenge, endless, survival)
- 60 achievements with graceful save migration
- 6 neon themes
- 18 spatial UI panels
- 10 procedural sound effects (correct, wrong, tick, streak, achievement, gameover, click, countdown, go, survival bonus, timer warning)
- Full keyboard + XR controller support with haptics
- Timer urgency: pulsing red lights + tick sounds
- Per-difficulty accuracy breakdown in game-over screen
- Category mastery indicators on category pick
- Dual perpendicular decorative torus rings in holodeck scene

# Check if there are session files with neon-trivia references
grep -rl "neon-trivia" ~/agents/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -10"}

item.name: exec
item.arguments:
{"command":"# Create journal directory and copy relevant session files
mkdir -p ~/workspace/neon-trivia/.agent/journal/state

# Get the session files that reference neon-trivia (from the grep above)
for f in $(grep -rl "neon-trivia" ~/agents/*/sessions/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null); do
  cp "$f" ~/workspace/neon-trivia/.agent/journal/
  echo "Copied: $f"
done

echo "---"
ls -la ~/workspace/neon-trivia/.agent/journal/ 2>&1"}
